part.name: Sensor mounting bracket
part.description: CNC-machined bracket for mounting a sensor. Must locate sensor precisely relative to a reference surface. Single prototype for fit check.
interfaces: 2x M3 clearance holes for bolting bracket to base
critical_features: M3 hole spacing and position relative to mounting face

manufacturing.process_notes: CNC mill, 3-axis acceptable. Deburr all edges.

open_questions: Sensor type and mounting footprint not yet defined — needed for detailed hole pattern
Does the bracket need to locate the sensor in Z (shimming) or just X/Y?
assumptions: 3-axis CNC milling is sufficient (no undercuts or complex 5-axis features)
No coating or surface treatment required for prototype
